name: Friend.tech
description: Friend.tech is a SocialFi platform on Base where you trade keys to access creators' private groups. Early users may receive FRIEND tokens.

steps.title: Join Friend.tech
steps.description: Visit friend.tech on mobile and sign up with Twitter. You'll need to bridge ETH to Base.

steps.title: Buy creator keys
steps.description: Purchase keys from creators you want to follow. Key prices rise with demand (bonding curve).
steps.tips: Early keys are cheaper - find rising creators

steps.title: Engage and hold
steps.description: Participate in chats, hold keys for extended periods. Activity may be rewarded in future token distribution.
steps.tips: Platform evolves fast - check official announcements

name: LayerZero
description: LayerZero is an omnichain interoperability protocol. Users of cross-chain applications built on LayerZero may qualify for airdrops.
requirements: Use LayerZero-powered apps (Stargate, Aptos Bridge, etc.)
Bridge between at least 3 different chains
Maintain some liquidity in Stargate Finance

steps.title: Use Stargate Finance
steps.description: Stargate is the main dApp built on LayerZero. Bridge stablecoins between chains (Ethereum, Arbitrum, Optimism, Polygon, etc.).

steps.title: Bridge between multiple chains
steps.description: Use Stargate to bridge USDC/USDT between at least 3-4 different networks. Each bridge counts as LayerZero usage.
steps.tips: Bridge smaller amounts multiple times rather than one large transaction

steps.title: Provide liquidity on Stargate
steps.description: Add liquidity to Stargate pools to earn fees and boost your airdrop eligibility. Even small amounts help.

steps.title: Use other LayerZero apps
steps.description: Explore other dApps: Aptos Bridge, Bitcoin.com Bridge, Radiant Capital (cross-chain lending).

risks: Multiple bridge fees add up quickly
Cross-chain bridges have smart contract risk
Competition is high - need to stand out

name: Optimism Quests
description: Optimism runs periodic quest campaigns to boost ecosystem engagement. Complete quests for on-chain attestations and potential retroactive rewards.

steps.title: Bridge to Optimism
steps.description: Use the official Optimism bridge to move ETH from Ethereum.

steps.title: Find active quests
steps.description: Check Galxe, Layer3, or official Optimism channels for current quest campaigns.

steps.title: Complete quest tasks
steps.description: Tasks usually involve swapping, providing liquidity, voting on governance, or using specific dApps.
steps.tips: Quests are often time-limited, act quickly

name: Scroll
description: Scroll is a zkEVM Layer 2 solution for Ethereum. Early users bridging and transacting may qualify for future airdrops.

steps.title: Bridge to Scroll
steps.description: Use the official Scroll bridge to transfer ETH from Ethereum mainnet. Start with 0.01 ETH minimum.

steps.title: Swap on Scroll DEXs
steps.description: Trade on native DEXs like Skydrome or Ambient to generate transaction volume.

steps.title: Use Scroll Ecosystem Apps
steps.description: Interact with lending protocols, NFT marketplaces, or mint a Scroll Name Service domain.
steps.tips: Diversify activity across different dApp categories

risks: Sybil detection may exclude obvious farmers

name: Blast
description: Blast is an Ethereum L2 with native yield on ETH and stablecoins. Early depositors and ecosystem users earn Blast Points for potential rewards.
requirements: Bridge ETH or stablecoins to Blast
Use Blast dApps to boost points

steps.title: Bridge to Blast
steps.description: Deposit ETH or stablecoins via the official Blast bridge. You'll earn automatic yield while on Blast.

steps.title: Accumulate Blast Points
steps.description: Points accrue automatically based on your deposit balance and time. Use Blast dApps to earn bonus points.
steps.tips: Longer deposits = more points

steps.title: Use Blast ecosystem dApps
steps.description: Try DEXs, lending platforms, or NFT marketplaces built on Blast to boost your point multiplier.

name: Ambient Finance
description: Ambient is a decentralized exchange with novel concentrated liquidity features. Early LPs and traders may receive AMB tokens.

steps.title: Connect to Ambient
steps.description: Visit Ambient Finance and connect your wallet. Available on Ethereum and Scroll.

steps.title: Provide liquidity
steps.description: Add liquidity to trading pairs. Ambient uses concentrated liquidity like Uniswap v3.
steps.tips: Active LPs may get higher rewards

steps.title: Trade and accumulate volume
steps.description: Make swaps on Ambient to generate trading volume and fees.
steps.tips: Use on Scroll for lower gas fees

name: Pendle
description: Pendle tokenizes yield from DeFi protocols. Users providing liquidity or trading yield tokens may receive incentives.

steps.title: Understand Pendle mechanics
steps.description: Pendle splits yield-bearing tokens into Principal Tokens (PT) and Yield Tokens (YT). You can trade or provide liquidity for these.

steps.title: Connect wallet to Pendle
steps.description: Use Pendle on Ethereum or Arbitrum. Arbitrum has lower fees.

steps.title: Provide liquidity or trade
steps.description: Add liquidity to PT/YT pools for trading fees, or trade yield tokens to speculate on interest rates.
steps.tips: Liquidity providers often receive bonus PENDLE rewards

name: Starknet
description: Starknet is a Layer 2 scaling solution for Ethereum using ZK-rollup technology. Active users may qualify for future token distributions.
requirements: Complete at least 5 transactions on different dApps
Interact with DeFi protocols (swap, provide liquidity)

steps.title: Set up Argent X or Braavos wallet
steps.description: Download the browser extension and create a new Starknet wallet. Save your seed phrase securely.

steps.title: Bridge ETH to Starknet
steps.description: Use the official Starknet bridge to transfer ETH from Ethereum mainnet. Minimum recommended: 0.01 ETH to cover gas fees.

steps.title: Interact with DeFi protocols
steps.description: Use your bridged ETH to interact with multiple protocols. Recommended: JediSwap (swap), mySwap (liquidity), Starknet ID (mint domain).

steps.title: Maintain activity for 30+ days
steps.description: Make weekly transactions to show consistent usage. Ideas: swap small amounts, vote on governance proposals if available.
steps.tips: Set a calendar reminder to do 1-2 transactions per week

risks: Gas fees can add up (budget $50-100 total)

name: Wormhole
description: Wormhole is a cross-chain messaging protocol. Users bridging assets and using Wormhole-powered apps may receive W tokens.

steps.title: Access Wormhole bridge
steps.description: Visit the Portal bridge (powered by Wormhole) to move assets between chains.

steps.title: Bridge assets
steps.description: Bridge tokens like USDC, ETH, SOL between Ethereum, Solana, Polygon, Arbitrum, and more.
steps.tips: Try different chain combinations

steps.title: Use Wormhole-powered dApps
steps.description: Many apps use Wormhole for cross-chain features. Look for Wormhole Connect integrations.

risks: Bridge hacks have occurred in past (now fixed)
W token already launched - airdrop potential lower

name: Manta Pacific
description: Manta Pacific is a modular L2 for zero-knowledge applications. Users participating in ecosystem activities may receive MANTA token rewards.

steps.title: Bridge assets to Manta
steps.description: Use the official Manta bridge to move ETH from Ethereum.

steps.title: Swap on Manta DEXs
steps.description: Trade tokens on ApertureSwap or other Manta-native DEXs.
steps.tips: Generate volume but watch gas costs

steps.title: Explore zkNFTs and privacy apps
steps.description: Manta specializes in zero-knowledge tech. Try minting zkNFTs or using privacy-focused dApps.

name: Particle Network
description: Particle Network provides wallet-as-a-service and account abstraction. Users trying Particle-powered dApps may receive PARTI tokens.

steps.title: Find Particle-powered dApps
steps.description: Look for apps that offer social login via Particle (Google, Twitter login for crypto apps).

steps.title: Create Particle wallet
steps.description: Sign up using social login. Particle creates a non-custodial wallet for you.

steps.title: Use Particle features
steps.description: Try gasless transactions, cross-chain swaps, or other Particle features in partnered dApps.
steps.tips: User-friendly for beginners

name: Aptos
description: Aptos is a Layer 1 blockchain focused on scalability. Ecosystem users may receive APT incentives through various campaigns.

steps.title: Install Petra Wallet
steps.description: Petra is the leading Aptos wallet. Install the browser extension.

steps.title: Bridge or buy APT
steps.description: Get APT from exchanges or bridge using LayerZero-powered bridges.

steps.title: Use Aptos DEXs and dApps
steps.description: Swap on PancakeSwap (Aptos), Liquidswap, or use Topaz NFT marketplace.

steps.title: Complete Aptos quests
steps.description: Check Galxe and Layer3 for Aptos-specific quest campaigns offering rewards.
steps.tips: Quests often have limited spots - act fast

risks: Token already live - less airdrop potential

name: Base
description: Base is Coinbase's Ethereum Layer 2. While no official airdrop confirmed, active ecosystem users may benefit from future incentives.
requirements: Bridge to Base via official bridge

steps.title: Bridge ETH to Base
steps.description: Use the official Base bridge or Coinbase wallet for easy onboarding.

steps.title: Swap on BaseSwap or Aerodrome
steps.description: Trade tokens on Base's main DEXs to generate activity.

steps.title: Mint an NFT or use SocialFi
steps.description: Explore Base ecosystem: mint on Zora, use Friend.tech (if available), or try Base Name Service.
steps.tips: Coinbase-backed projects often reward early users

name: Polygon zkEVM
description: Polygon zkEVM is a ZK-rollup scaling solution. Users may receive POL incentives for ecosystem engagement.

steps.title: Bridge to zkEVM
steps.description: Use the official Polygon bridge to move assets from Ethereum to zkEVM.

steps.title: Use zkEVM DEXs
steps.description: Swap on QuickSwap, PancakeSwap, or other zkEVM DEXs.

steps.title: Explore lending and NFTs
steps.description: Try AAVE on zkEVM for lending, or mint NFTs on zkEVM marketplaces.
steps.tips: Diversify activity types for better eligibility

risks: POL already distributed - less airdrop potential

name: Shardeum
description: Shardeum is an EVM-based sharded blockchain. Testnet users may receive SHM token airdrops upon mainnet launch.

steps.title: Add Shardeum testnet to MetaMask
steps.description: Configure your MetaMask to connect to Shardeum Sphinx testnet.

steps.title: Claim testnet SHM
steps.description: Use the Shardeum faucet to get free testnet tokens.

steps.title: Use testnet dApps
steps.description: Swap, mint NFTs, or provide liquidity on testnet DEXs. Generate transaction history.
steps.tips: More diverse activity = better odds

name: ZetaChain
description: ZetaChain enables omnichain smart contracts. Users interacting with ZetaChain and its ecosystem may receive ZETA rewards.

steps.title: Set up ZetaChain wallet
steps.description: Add ZetaChain network to MetaMask or use ZetaHub.

steps.title: Bridge to ZetaChain
steps.description: Use the official ZetaChain bridge or Hub to move assets from other chains.

steps.title: Use ZetaChain dApps
steps.description: Try ZetaSwap, provide liquidity, or use omnichain messaging apps.
steps.tips: Cross-chain features are ZetaChain's specialty

name: zkSync Era
description: zkSync Era is a ZK-rollup Layer 2 scaling solution. Users who bridge and use the network may qualify for future token airdrops.
requirements: Optional: Add liquidity or use zkSync Paymaster

steps.title: Add zkSync Era to MetaMask
steps.description: Add the zkSync Era network to your MetaMask wallet using the official bridge site.

steps.title: Bridge assets to zkSync Era
steps.description: Bridge ETH or stablecoins from Ethereum mainnet. Minimum: 0.01 ETH recommended.

steps.title: Use multiple dApps
steps.description: Interact with SyncSwap (DEX), Mute.io (liquidity), zkSync Name Service (mint .zk domain).

steps.title: Accumulate transaction volume
steps.description: Aim for 10-20 transactions spread over multiple weeks. Diverse activity (swaps, liquidity, NFT minting) is better than repetitive actions.
steps.tips: Small transactions count - you don't need to use large amounts

risks: Network still in early stage - potential bugs
Sybil detection may filter out farmers

name: Aethir
description: Aethir is a decentralized GPU cloud infrastructure. Users checking in daily and participating in ecosystem may earn ATH tokens.

steps.title: Create Aethir account
steps.description: Sign up on the Aethir website with email or wallet.

steps.title: Complete daily check-ins
steps.description: Log in daily to accumulate points. Consistency is rewarded.
steps.tips: Set a daily reminder

steps.title: Join campaigns and tasks
steps.description: Aethir runs periodic campaigns on Twitter, Discord, and partner platforms. Participate for bonus points.

name: Celestia
description: Celestia is a modular data availability network. Developers deploying rollups and users staking TIA may qualify for future incentives.

steps.title: Acquire TIA tokens
steps.description: Buy TIA on major exchanges (Binance, OKX) and transfer to a Cosmos-compatible wallet like Keplr.

steps.title: Stake TIA
steps.description: Stake your TIA through validators to earn rewards and participate in network security.
steps.tips: Choose validators with good uptime

steps.title: Use Celestia rollups
steps.description: Interact with rollups built on Celestia's DA layer. Check ecosystem page for active projects.

name: dYdX v4
description: dYdX v4 is a standalone blockchain for perpetual trading. Traders and liquidity providers may receive DYDX rewards.

steps.title: Create dYdX account
steps.description: Sign up on dYdX v4 using your email or connect a wallet.

steps.title: Deposit funds
steps.description: Deposit USDC via Ethereum, Arbitrum, or other supported chains.
steps.tips: Use Arbitrum to save on gas

steps.title: Trade perpetuals
steps.description: Trade BTC-PERP, ETH-PERP, or altcoin perpetuals. Volume and fees generate rewards.
steps.tips: Market makers get higher rewards

steps.title: Stake DYDX (optional)
steps.description: Stake DYDX tokens to earn staking rewards and participate in governance.

risks: Perpetual trading is high risk - can be liquidated

name: Hyperlane
description: Hyperlane is a permissionless interoperability layer. Users bridging and deploying apps may receive HYP tokens.

steps.title: Find Hyperlane-powered bridges
steps.description: Many bridges use Hyperlane under the hood. Check Hyperlane docs for supported routes.

steps.title: Bridge assets across chains
steps.description: Use Hyperlane-enabled bridges to move assets between chains. Each bridge counts.
steps.tips: Bridge between lesser-known chains for less competition

steps.title: Deploy Hyperlane app (optional)
steps.description: Developers can deploy custom messaging apps using Hyperlane SDK.

name: Sui
description: Sui is a high-performance Layer 1 blockchain. Testnet users and ecosystem participants may qualify for future incentives.
requirements: Mint NFTs or use DeFi protocols

steps.title: Set up Sui Wallet
steps.description: Install the Sui Wallet browser extension and create a new wallet.

steps.title: Get SUI tokens
steps.description: For testnet: use faucet. For mainnet: buy SUI on exchanges and transfer to your wallet.

steps.title: Use Sui ecosystem dApps
steps.description: Try Cetus DEX, Suiswap, Bluemove NFT marketplace, or Scallop lending.

name: Berachain
description: Berachain is an EVM-compatible L1 with innovative liquidity proof of stake. Testnet users may qualify for BERA airdrops.

steps.title: Add Berachain testnet to wallet
steps.description: Configure MetaMask with Berachain testnet RPC.

steps.title: Get testnet BERA
steps.description: Use the Berachain faucet to claim testnet tokens.

steps.title: Use testnet dApps
steps.description: Swap on BEX DEX, provide liquidity, mint Beras (NFTs), or try other testnet apps.
steps.tips: Testnet participation often rewarded generously

risks: Testnet only - mainnet launch date TBA

latestSignal.title: 10xTVL GrowthGrew TVL from $30m to $300m after integrating Proof of Liquidity incentives, with peak TVL of >$1B. Open Dolomite

name: Fuel Network
description: Fuel is the fastest modular execution layer. Testnet users and developers may qualify for airdrops when mainnet launches.

steps.title: Set up Fuel wallet
steps.description: Install the Fuel wallet browser extension and connect to the testnet.

steps.title: Get testnet tokens
steps.description: Use the Fuel faucet to claim testnet tokens for transactions.

steps.title: Use Fuel testnet dApps
steps.description: Try DEXs, NFT minting, or other testnet apps. Make diverse transactions.
steps.tips: Testnet activity often rewarded in crypto

steps.title: Learn Sway (optional)
steps.description: Fuel's smart contract language. Developers deploying contracts may get higher rewards.

name: EigenLayer
description: EigenLayer enables restaking ETH to secure additional protocols. Restakers may receive EIGEN token airdrops.
requirements: Stake ETH or LSTs on EigenLayer

steps.title: Acquire ETH or liquid staking tokens
steps.description: You can restake native ETH or LSTs like stETH, rETH, cbETH on EigenLayer.

steps.title: Connect to EigenLayer app
steps.description: Visit the official EigenLayer app and connect your wallet (MetaMask, Ledger).

steps.title: Deposit and restake
steps.description: Deposit your ETH/LSTs into EigenLayer. Your assets will secure multiple protocols simultaneously.
steps.tips: Longer staking periods may yield higher rewards

steps.title: Choose operators (optional)
steps.description: Delegate your stake to node operators who will validate for AVS (Actively Validated Services).

risks: Smart contract risk - funds locked in protocol

name: MetaMask Snaps
description: MetaMask Snaps extend wallet functionality. Early adopters testing Snaps may qualify if MetaMask launches a token.

steps.title: Install MetaMask Flask
steps.description: Download Flask, the experimental MetaMask version that supports Snaps.

steps.title: Browse and install Snaps
steps.description: Explore the Snaps directory and install different categories: notifications, transaction insights, multi-chain support.
steps.tips: Install at least 5 different Snaps

steps.title: Use Snaps regularly
steps.description: Interact with installed Snaps when making transactions or managing assets.

name: Linea
description: Linea has recent official activity that may indicate points, incentives, quests, or ecosystem participation worth monitoring for future rewards.
requirements: Read the latest official announcement carefully
Complete only the tasks explicitly promoted on the official site
Track wallet activity over multiple weeks if the campaign is ongoing

steps.title: Complete the currently promoted actions

name: Monad
description: Monad is a high-performance EVM-compatible L1. Currently pre-launch, but community members may qualify for future airdrops.

steps.title: Join Monad community
steps.description: Follow Monad on Twitter and join their Discord for updates.

steps.title: Wait for testnet
steps.description: Monad testnet is not yet live. Stay active in community until launch is announced.
steps.tips: Early community members often get preferential treatment

steps.title: Participate when testnet launches
steps.description: Once testnet is live, use it actively. Complete transactions, provide feedback.
steps.tips: Set up alerts for Monad announcements

name: Arbitrum Odyssey
description: Arbitrum Odyssey campaigns reward users exploring the ecosystem. Participate in weekly challenges to earn NFT badges and potential future rewards.

steps.title: Check Odyssey schedule
steps.description: Visit the official Arbitrum Odyssey page to see current and upcoming week challenges.

steps.title: Complete weekly tasks
steps.description: Each week focuses on different protocols: DEXs, NFT markets, lending, bridges. Complete tasks to earn badges.

steps.title: Collect all badges
steps.description: Accumulate as many NFT badges as possible. Higher participation may lead to better rewards.
steps.tips: Don't miss weeks - consistency matters

risks: Costs add up across multiple weeks
